settings.text:
Pillowta was created with one simple belief everyone deserves to feel truly Connected to themselves and to others.
In a fast-moving world, intimacy often fades into routine. Pillowta brings you back to Presence, Warmth, and Emotional Honesty. We believe desire should be felt openly, connection should feel safe, and intimacy should always be human.
Not pressured. Not performative. Just real.
Pillowta is for couples seeking closeness, individuals exploring themselves, and anyone longing for deeper meaning in connection. Here, intimacy doesn’t start with someone else.
It Starts With You.

Pillowta believes intimacy should Feel Safe, Natural, And Real.

In a world driven by speed and distraction, we offer a pause, a gentle return to Presence, Warmth, And Connection.

Whether you seek closeness, comfort after a long day, or a deeper connection with yourself.

Pillowta creates space for Emotions, Honesty, And Touch That Truly Feels Human.

What we offer is only the beginning.

The Real Experience Happens Within You.

settings.policy_content:
Shipping Time: Orders are usually processed and shipped within 48 hours. Some orders can take longer, such as pre-order items. 

Shipping Charges: We offer free shipping on all prepaid domestic orders. 

Tracking: You will receive tracking details over WhatsApp, email, and SMS once the order is shipped. 

Delivery Timeline: Orders are generally delivered within 2-7 days, depending on the delivery Pincode and shipping partners. 

At the time of order delivery: If you think you have received the product in a poor condition or if the packaging is tampered with or damaged before delivery, please deny the delivery and do not accept the order. Also, contact our care team mentioning your order ID, and we will ensure that a brand-new replacement is issued to you with no additional cost. 

Incomplete or Incorrect Address: It is the responsibility of the customer to provide a complete and accurate shipping address. We will not be responsible for orders delivered to incorrect or incomplete addresses provided by the customer. 

Returns Due to Non-Delivery: If an order is returned to us due to non-delivery or incorrect address, the customer will be responsible for the cost of re-shipping the order. If the customer chooses not to have the order re-shipped, a refund will be issued for the purchase price, excluding shipping charges. 

When do I have to self-ship the product to Pillowta?  

Though a specific courier may deliver products to your address, they may not have the service for a reverse pick-up facility. In such cases, you will have to ship the product back to us. Connect with our care team at support@pillowta.com, and we will share the address for return. 

We value your trust in our shipping services and strive to provide a seamless and satisfying experience. If you have any further inquiries or require assistance, our dedicated customer support team is available to help.
